query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
('Cairo', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Alexandria', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Giza', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Sharm El Sheikh', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Hurghada', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Luxor', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Aswan', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Port Said', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Suez', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1),
('Mansoura', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'EG'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
